Products.Name: Pursuit Helmet
Features:
CFD-modeled, wind-tunnel-validated aerodynamic design saves
1.66 watts over the previous model. Optimized vent placement and internal airflow channels maximize cooling without increasing drag. Integrated eyewear storage securely holds sunglasses when not in use. Proprietary central dimple geometry optimizes airflow and reduces turbulence. Integrated Mips Air Node Pro rotational impact protection. Dual-density EPS with lower Hardbody construction for enhanced impact management. Five-position Cinch Pro fit system enables precise, race-ready adjustment. Lightweight, low-profile strap system enhances comfort at speed. Fidlock® magnetic buckle allows fast, secure one-handed fastening.

Technologies.Name: Virginia Tech 5 Star Rating
Technologies.Description: In collaboration with the Insurance Institute for Highway Safety, the Virginia Tech Helmet lab tests helmets using the STAR evaluation system. The  impact tests evaluate a helmet's ability to reduce linear acceleration and rotational velocity of the head resulting from a range of impacts a cyclist might experience. Helmets with more stars provide a reduction in concussion risk for these impacts, with 4 and 5 star ratings being the most highly recommended. Read more.

Products.Name: Rev Pro Mips Helmet
Features:
Optimized for maximumcooling at any speed, minimal weight and reduced drag.
Techno Arch Reinforcement distributes impact forces across the entire structure.
Integrated eyewear storage design for securing glasses when not in use.
Dual Density EPS and Lower Hardbody construction.
Integrated Mips Air Node Pro rotational impact protection.
Three-position adjustable height Cinch Pro fit system.
Comfortable lightweight strap system.
Fidlock® magnetic buckle for secure one-handed fastening.

Products.Name: SHUTTLE CLIP BOA
Features:
Two-piece microfiber upper – Breathable, quick-drying microfiber construction delivers durability and abrasion resistance for technical riding and racing.
BOA® L6 dial closure – Precision lace mapping with a micro-adjustable BOA® L6 dial delivers evenly distributed, secure retention that’s easy to adjust mid-ride, even in wet and muddy conditions.
Semi-custom arch support platform – Integrated arch structure paired with interchangeable, two-position arch inserts allows riders to fine-tune fit, alignment, and support.
EVA midsole with injected nylon base plate – A tuned EVA midsole balances cushioning and ride feel, while a nylon injected plate delivers stable pedaling support without an overly rigid feel.
Designed for women - A narrower heel and lower-volume forefoot delivers a more secure, stable fit.
Vibram® MegaGrip rubber outsole – Proven compound delivers reliable traction on wet roots, slick rock, and loose terrain while maintaining long-term durability.
Extended 2-bolt cleat adjustment – 2-bolt cleat compatibility with 35mm fore/aft adjustment enables precise cleat positioning for control and efficiency.
Rock Print toe kick – Reinforced toe protection adds durability against impacts, trail debris, and off-bike wear.

Designed for women - A narrower heel and lower-volume forefoot delivers a more secure, stable fit.

Technologies.Name: UniClip
Technologies.Description: Giant Contact series saddles all feature the UniClip system mount. UniClip is a unique, proprietary design that enhances the overall aesthetic of the bike while providing a secure mounting system for exclusive Giant accessories.

Technologies.Name: Particle Flow
Technologies.Description: A tailor-made feel is now achievable through Particle Flow Technology, which are free-flowing particles are inserted into two separate pockets within the saddle structure. The particles mold to the rider’s unique pelvic contact condition, reducing pressure points by more than 20 percent and distributing pressure across a broader contact area. The result is optimal performance through superior comfort and support.

Products.Name: Roost Helmet

Technologies.Name: Mips®
Technologies.Description: The Mips® BPS (Brain Protection System) is designed to add protection in helmets against the rotational motion. The rotational motion is a combination of rotational energy (angular velocity) and rotational forces (from angular acceleration) that both affects the brain and increases the risk for minor and severe brain injuries. Mips® BPS has been scientifically proven to reduce rotational motion when implemented in a helmet by absorbing and redirecting rotational energies and forces transferred to the brain.

Technologies.Name: UniClip
Technologies.Description: Giant Contact series saddles all feature the UniClip system mount. UniClip is a unique, proprietary design that enhances the overall aesthetic of the bike while providing a secure mounting system for exclusive Giant accessories.

Technologies.Name: Particle Flow
Technologies.Description: A tailor-made feel is now achievable through Particle Flow Technology, which are free-flowing particles are inserted into two separate pockets within the saddle structure. The particles mold to the rider’s unique pelvic contact condition, reducing pressure points by more than 20 percent and distributing pressure across a broader contact area. The result is optimal performance through superior comfort and support.

Products.Name: Liv Fera 2 Womens Cycling Shoe
Features:
Motion Efficiency System (MES)—keeps the forefoot stiff while enabling torsional movement of the rear and mid foot
MES integrated nylon plate technology, scientifically proven to provide heel-to-forefoot stiffness while allowing the lower leg and heel to move independently result in a lower rate of knee injuries.
High traction rubber sole comprises the ForceDrive™ nylon midsole and rubber outsole for confidence to push the limits on rock gardens and navigate the hike-a-bike sections.
The Nylon upper material is built to ventilate and protect while and contains hi-density mesh inserts offer excellent airflow while resisting mud, sand and grass
Injection hook-and-loop closure keeps the straps from loosening as your ride, securing your foot from the get go for the long haul.
Reversed front strap for improved comfort and a more secure fit from the reinforcement created by the opposing
Velcro straps relieving unnecessary foot pressure.
Built with a woman-specific fit last with a smaller forefoot and heel volume to provide optimal comfort without heel slip.
Double secure toe cleat inserts allowing exact cleat placement along a longer lateral surface.

Technologies.Name: Mips®
Technologies.Description: The Mips® BPS (Brain Protection System) is designed to add protection in helmets against the rotational motion. The rotational motion is a combination of rotational energy (angular velocity) and rotational forces (from angular acceleration) that both affects the brain and increases the risk for minor and severe brain injuries. Mips® BPS has been scientifically proven to reduce rotational motion when implemented in a helmet by absorbing and redirecting rotational energies and forces transferred to the brain.

Products.Name: Relay Mips Womens Helmet
Features:

In-molded construction for added strength
TransTextura moisture-wicking, anti-odor inner padding
Ponytail-friendly rear fit system

Technologies.Name: Mips®
Technologies.Description: The Mips® BPS (Brain Protection System) is designed to add protection in helmets against the rotational motion. The rotational motion is a combination of rotational energy (angular velocity) and rotational forces (from angular acceleration) that both affects the brain and increases the risk for minor and severe brain injuries. Mips® BPS has been scientifically proven to reduce rotational motion when implemented in a helmet by absorbing and redirecting rotational energies and forces transferred to the brain.
